title: Boombastic's Christmas Decades Party NORTHAMPTON
description: The Christmas party to end them all. Three decades. One dance floor. Zero shame. Northampton's ultimate festive knees-up blends the best of the 80s, 90s and 00s into one glitter-covered night. From Spice Girls to Oasis, Britney to Bon Jovi, every anthem gets its moment. Expect big choruses, sequins everywhere, and confetti raining down as the year wraps up in style. Forget boring work dos — this is where you'll actually want to be, belting every lyric until your throat gives out.
